title: function-point
content:
point functionone:表示為 指標*one: 就是這個指標所指向的記憶體空間的內容，也就是一個結構student * one ：one 這個指標指向一個 student 類型的結構1234567891011121314151617#include #include  struct student{  int age;  char name[10];}; int main(){  student lynn = {23, {'l', 'y', 'n', 'n', '\0'}};  student *one = &lynn;  printf("%d \n", (*one).age); //(*one).age可以改寫成one->age  printf("%s \n", (*one).name);  system("pause");  return 0;}

1234567891011121314151617181920212223#include #include #include  struct student{  int age;  char name[10];}; void new_one(student *one){  (*one).age = 1000 +(*one).age;  for(int i = 0; (*one).name[i] != '\0'; i++)    (*one).name[i] = toupper((*one).name[i]);}; int main(){  student lynn = {23, {'l', 'y', 'n', 'n', '\0'}};  new_one(&lynn);  printf("%d \n", lynn.age);  printf("%s \n", lynn.name);  system("pause");  return 0;}

title: Hello World
content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post"

More info: Writing
Run server1$ hexo server

More info: Server
Generate static files1$ hexo generate

More info: Generating
Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy

More info: Deployment
